revision.comment: rmv "class=glossary" (unnecessary, containing <dl> has the class; CSS will cascade)
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude>

<dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects D]]

<dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]<!--Categories go in the /doc subpage.--> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

<dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!--Please add this template's categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here - thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
revision.text: <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!--Please add this template's categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here - thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Defn here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Defn for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <dd {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{class|}}}|class="{{{class}}}"|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{id|}}}|id="{{{id}}}"|{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{term|}}}|id="{{{term}}}-defn{{{2|{{{no|1}}}}}}"|}}|}} {{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{style|}}}|style="{{{style}}}"|}}>{{safesubst<noinclude/>:#if:{{{2|{{{no|}}}}}}|{{{2|{{{no}}}}}}.  |}}{{{defn|{{{1|{{{content}}}}}}}}}</dd><noinclude> {{documentation}}<!--Please add this template's categories to the /doc subpage, interwikis to Wikidata, not here - thanks!--> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24926181992|commit triggered pipeline]]
